# Mos API context

Mos does not provide a hosted user API for controlling the local macOS app.

The public OpenAPI document describes static discovery endpoints that agents can fetch:

- OpenAPI: https://mos.caldis.me/api/openapi.json
- Markdown homepage: https://mos.caldis.me/index.md
- llms.txt: https://mos.caldis.me/llms.txt
- Full LLM context: https://mos.caldis.me/llms-full.txt
- Agent discovery: https://mos.caldis.me/.well-known/agent.json
- A2A agent card: https://mos.caldis.me/.well-known/agent-card.json
- MCP discovery status: https://mos.caldis.me/.well-known/mcp
- Schema map: https://mos.caldis.me/schema-map.xml

Authentication: none for public static discovery endpoints.

OAuth: not provided.

Webhooks: not provided.

Hosted MCP tool server: not provided.
